obj_battlecontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_42: * You won^1!&* Got ~1 EXP and ~2 D$./%
obj_boxpuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_437: ＊ See^1, I used the box to break in the door^1.&＊ Easy./%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_47: * Hohoho..^1.&* Well STEP on my BOOTS./
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_49: * You boys or girls had better turn back while you can./
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_51: * Lancer!!!&* What is it this time!?/
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_82: * Something EXTREMELY dangerous is lying ahead!/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_92: * Ha^1! I can't go home at all because I'm so scared!/
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_18: * THAT??^1? THAT'S what you're afraid of???/
* W..^1. Wow^1, purple girl^1!&* You aren't scared!?/
* Heh^1, why would I be^1? What's it gonna do?/
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_35: * It crushes people to death^1, I think./%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_62: * Wow!^1! You clowns really ARE heroes!!/
* You saved the next twenty minutes of my life!!/
* Yeah^1, yeah^1, I am pretty great^1, huh...?/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_65: \E8* Not to downplay your contributions^1, but.../
\E1* You..^1. didn't actually help at all./
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_66: \EB* You only made everything WORSE by attacking it./
\E1* If you had just acted nice to it in the first place.../
\E6* We could have avoided that entire battle./
\E2* The only thing keeping it at bay was MY AX!/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_68: * And^1, earlier^1, you terrorized those troops.../
* Those guys were ENEMIES^1. They're FOR terrorizing./
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_69: * And before that^1, you ate an innocent person's cake.../%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_71: \E1* Susie..^1. Whether you like it or not.../
\E0* One with the power to bring peace to the future./
\E5* Could you please start..^1. acting like one?/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_73: * Yeah^1, when you lay it out like that.../
* I've been a pretty bad hero^1, haven't I?/
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_76: * Alright^1, Ralsei^1.&* You got it^1.&* I'll change my ways./
* From now on^1, I won't be such a rotten hero anymore./%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_79: * I'll just be one of the BAD GUYS instead!/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_82: \E3* You're going to be on MY team?/
* Quiet^1, Toothpaste Boy^1! Susie is MY comrade now!/
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_83: * We're going to have monogrammed track jackets!/
* And sleepovers^1! Where we tell each other secrets!/
\E2* Anyway^1, uhh^1, see you guys never./
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_84: * Haha!^1! If you can even last that long!/%
obj_checker_animtest_slash_Step_0_gml_89: \E6* Perhaps I shouldn't have been so hard on her./
* But^1, I just worry that if Susie is too eager to fight.../
\E6* Well^1, let's just be kind to her^1, OK^1, Kris?/
\E8* I'm sure Susie'll come around soon!/%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_119_: * K. ROUND felt stressed out and attacked!/%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_226_: * K. ROUND's HP and ATTACK went up!/
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_228_: * Susie^1! Stop attacking it^1! You're making it stronger!/
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_230_: * Pssh^1, and let it think I'm AFRAID^1? No way!/%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_263_: * K.ROUND - AT 9 DF 3&* Check^1?&* That's chess^1, not checkers!/%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_277_: * K.ROUND - AT 9 DF 3&* Watch out for its Flying King attack!/
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_278_: * (Also^1, you need to get the CROWN off of its head.)/%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_282_: * K.ROUND - AT 9 DF 3&* It's being controlled into attacking...!/
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_327_: * It bowed back^1.&* Its crown loosened a little./%
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_330_: * It bowed back^1.&* Its crown loosened a little./
obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_447_: * That's it^1, Kris^1! If we can get its crown off.../

obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_449_: \E0* Susie^1! Help us bow at it!/
